title: Strategies and initiatives – Health Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Strategies and Initiatives
Health Canada develops and implements policies intended to maintain and improve the health of Canadians. Current key areas of concern include:
- promoting good health
- strengthening health care
- providing relevant health information
- Canadian Diabetes Strategy
- Environmental Impact Initiative
- Canada's Tobacco Strategy
- First Nations and Inuit Health
- Food and Consumer Safety Action Plan
- Health Canada's Report to the Clerk on Public Service Renewal
- Modernizing Canada’s food regulations
- Regulatory Innovation Agenda for Health Products
- Biotechnology Strategy
- Sustainable Development
